_comment: LIVE-VERIFY fixture (#42). Built to the observed Spansh Road-to-Riches planner result shape (a list of systems under `systems`, each with `system`/`jumps` and a `bodies[]` of `{name, subtype, value}` estimated first-discovery scan values, plus a system-level `value` total). Full /api/results/<job> envelope; the client returns body.result. Field names to be confirmed on-hardware and corrected in parse_riches_route if they drift.
